description: Help users prepare for job interviews by analyzing job descriptions and company information

skills.name: jd-interview-prep
skills.description: Help users prepare for job interviews by analyzing job descriptions and company information. Use this skill when the user wants to prepare for an interview, provides a job description (JD) and company name, or mentions interview preparation. Make sure to use this skill whenever the user asks about interview prep, mentions a specific company and JD, or wants to prepare for a technical interview.
